---
title: "Mary Penelope Fursdon"
---

## Mary Penelope Fursdon

**Dates:** (1851-1925)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

A Gosling as ‘Pixie’ 1870-1876, she was fourth daughter of the Rev. Edward Fursdon [LG 1952 Fursdon]

### Letters

- Letter from April 1st 1876
- Letter from Novr 15 1872
- Letter from Aug 29th [1871?] 
- Letter from [10 July 1870]
- Letter from May 31 st [1870] 
- Letter from Jany 29th [1870]
- Letter from July 29th [1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
